name: Spicy Beef Carbonade
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds sirloin tips or stew beef
1 dash tabasco sauce or habanero sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large, flameproof casserole dish, add bacon, olive oil, onions, and garlic.
Saute until the ingredients are tender.
2. Add beef, brown sugar, vinegar, wine, broth, chili powder, herbs (rosemary,
thyme, oregano), tabasco or habanero sauce, salt, and pepper.
3. Place the lid on the dish to keep in juices. Cook on high for 10 minutes.
4. Reduce heat to simmer for 1 hour.
5. Remove the lid and discard the bay leaves. Mix in corn starch.
6. Add a little more wine, then cook on high for another 10 minutes,
stirring often, until thick.
7. Serve over rice or pasta. (Optional: add Thai chiles, habaneros, or serranos
to increase heat.)
